executive_summary: Turn the payment rail's raw captured charges (ops_payment_events, from the COMPLETED SD-LEO-INFRA-PAYMENT-RAIL-FOUNDATION-001) into a STRUCTURED replacement-net INPUT substrate so the income gauge is truthful — the first real dollar lands as net-of-deductions inputs, not topline-only, and the shipped replacement-net formula (SD-LEO-INFRA-INCOME-OBJECTIVE-FUNCTION-001) is fed by real dollars instead of projections only. DATABASE sub-agent verdict (evidence 6bc9ed41): create a dedicated portfolio-level monthly table income_capture_monthly (do NOT extend ops_revenue_metrics — it is per-venture/daily with per-venture JWT RLS and a full-spread upsert writer; grain mismatch + writer-contract breakage + RLS blast radius). Store the 5 replacement-net inputs as separate structured columns (recurring_revenue, business_expenses, ppo, retirement_solo_401k, se_tax) with NO precomputed net column, so net is computed at read time by replacement-net.js and gross is never reconstructable. Revenue/expenses are fleet-derived from captured charges; the THREE chairman-gated deductions (ppo/solo_401k/se_tax) are NULLABLE with NO default — NULL = explicit unattested (never a silent 0) — and are populated ONLY from a chairman attestation row in chairman_decisions (decision_type='replacement_net_deduction_params'), referenced by deduction_attestation_ref; the fleet aggregator NEVER writes the deduction columns. A venture-agnostic service-role aggregator reads ops_payment_events (status='succeeded') and upserts the structured monthly inputs; the income gauge reads only livemode=true rows. The bridge is proved end-to-end with a TEST-mode charge (livemode=false) flowing rail -> ops_payment_events -> substrate -> replacementNet() returns a real net-of-deductions figure, then cleaned up. RLS is least-privilege (service write, authenticated read-only, revoke anon/authenticated writes); ops_payment_events RLS is unchanged. replacement-net.js keeps its pure-function signature; glide-path scoring is regression-clean.

functional_requirements.title: Create the income_capture_monthly substrate (migration)
functional_requirements.description: New table public.income_capture_monthly per the DATABASE sub-agent design: id uuid PK; period_month date NOT NULL (first-of-month, CHECK date_trunc('month',period_month)=period_month); recurring_revenue numeric(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0; business_expenses numeric(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0; ppo / retirement_solo_401k / se_tax numeric(12,2) NULLABLE (NO default — NULL=unattested); revenue_source text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ops_payment_events_aggregate'; revenue_event_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0; livemode boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true; deduction_attestation_ref uuid REFERENCES chairman_decisions(id); computed_at/created_at/updated_at timestamptz. UNIQUE(period_month, livemode) (REFINEMENT over the agent's UNIQUE(period_month): so a test-mode and a live-mode monthly aggregate cannot collide). Index (period_month DESC). Migration includes a rollback (DROP TABLE) at the bottom per migration-safety. Do NOT precompute/store net (structured-not-topline).
acceptance_criteria: income_capture_monthly created with the 5 structured input columns + provenance; NO net column
UNIQUE(period_month, livemode); first-of-month CHECK; rollback present
ppo/retirement_solo_401k/se_tax are NULLABLE with no default (NULL=unattested)

functional_requirements.title: Venture-agnostic charge->net aggregator (service role)
functional_requirements.description: A transform/aggregator that runs as service_role, reads ops_payment_events WHERE status='succeeded' (parameterized by livemode), aggregates by date_trunc('month',event_ts): recurring_revenue = sum(amount_cents)/100.0, revenue_event_count = count(*), revenue_source='ops_payment_events_aggregate', and UPSERTs into income_capture_monthly on (period_month, livemode). It writes ONLY revenue/expenses/source/count/livemode — NEVER the chairman deduction columns (ppo/retirement_solo_401k/se_tax). Idempotent per (period_month, livemode); venture-agnostic (portfolio-level, no per-venture hardcoding). amount_cents is bigint cents -> dollars numeric(12,2).
acceptance_criteria: aggregator upserts structured monthly inputs from ops_payment_events succeeded charges (idempotent on period_month+livemode)
it never writes ppo/retirement_solo_401k/se_tax
recurring_revenue correctly converts cents->dollars; revenue_event_count matches the charge count

functional_requirements.title: Chairman-gated deduction params (attestation, default 0/blocking, never fabricated)
functional_requirements.description: The three deductions (ppo, solo_401k, se_tax) are populated ONLY from a chairman attestation row in chairman_decisions (decision_type='replacement_net_deduction_params', context={ppo,solo_401k,se_tax,effective_period}, decided_by, blocking=true until set); the capture row's deduction_attestation_ref FK points to it. Absent attestation: deduction_attestation_ref IS NULL and the three columns are NULL = EXPLICIT unattested (surfaced, not silent). The fleet NEVER fabricates these figures. Do NOT self-author the attestation in code (no @approved-by literal) — route the actual chairman attestation via the coordinator->chairman (claim-RPC chairman-gate precedent). This SD ships the MECHANISM + the unattested default; the real figures arrive via chairman attestation later.
acceptance_criteria: deduction columns populated only from a chairman_decisions attestation row (referenced by deduction_attestation_ref)
absent attestation -> NULL columns + NULL ref = explicit unattested (no fleet-fabricated value, no silent 0)
no @approved-by literal / self-authored attestation in code

functional_requirements.title: Wire replacement-net.js to consume the real substrate (preserve signature)
functional_requirements.description: replacement-net.js replacementNet({revenue, business_expenses, ppo, retirement, se_tax}) consumes income_capture_monthly as one valid input source, mapping recurring_revenue->revenue and retirement_solo_401k->retirement. Preserve the pure-function signature (revenue - business_expenses - ppo - retirement - se_tax) and fail-safe-to-0 behavior. NULL deductions coalesce to 0 ONLY at the read boundary, and the consumer surfaces an explicit unattested:true/blocking flag when deduction_attestation_ref IS NULL (so a 0 deduction is never mistaken for an attested 0). Glide-path scoring must be regression-clean (the new input source does not change replacementNet()'s contract or existing rankings).
acceptance_criteria: replacementNet() returns correct net from a substrate row, signature unchanged
NULL deductions coalesce to 0 at the boundary WITH an explicit unattested/blocking surface
glide-path scorer regression suite passes unchanged

functional_requirements.title: TEST-mode end-to-end proof (rail -> substrate -> replacementNet)
functional_requirements.description: Prove the bridge: insert a TEST-mode charge (livemode=false, status='succeeded') into ops_payment_events; run the aggregator in test mode; assert an income_capture_monthly row (livemode=false) exists for that month with recurring_revenue populated from the TEST charge (charge id traceable); feed it to replacementNet() and assert a real net-of-deductions figure. The income gauge reads only livemode=true rows so the test income never pollutes the real figure. Clean up the test rows after (net-zero). Never use a live/real charge in the test.
acceptance_criteria: a TEST charge (livemode=false) aggregates into a livemode=false substrate row with recurring_revenue from the charge (traceable)
replacementNet() fed from it returns a real net; the gauge's real figure (livemode=true) is unaffected by the test row
test rows cleaned up (net-zero); no live charge used

functional_requirements.title: Least-privilege RLS + SECURITY review
functional_requirements.description: income_capture_monthly RLS: ENABLE RLS; policy service_role ALL (aggregator); policy authenticated SELECT-only (gauge read); REVOKE INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/TRUNCATE FROM anon, authenticated. NO anon policy. ZERO changes to ops_payment_events RLS (the aggregator reads it via service_role only). Invoke the SECURITY sub-agent in EXEC to review: (a) no-widening on ops_payment_events, (b) authenticated cannot reconstruct gross (no net column; 5 components), (c) the livemode income filter keeps test-mode charges out of the real figure, (d) the NULL-means-unattested deduction contract.
acceptance_criteria: RLS: service write, authenticated read-only, writes revoked from anon/authenticated; no anon policy
ops_payment_events RLS unchanged (verified)
SECURITY sub-agent PASS on the migration + the four review points

functional_requirements.title: Tests + migration validation
functional_requirements.description: DATABASE_MIGRATION validation on the forward+rollback SQL; aggregator unit/integration test (cents->dollars, idempotency, deduction columns never written); replacementNet-from-substrate unit tests (attested figures -> correct net; unattested -> NULL coalesced to 0 + unattested surface); glide-path scorer regression test (unchanged); the FR-5 end-to-end TEST-mode proof as an integration test with cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: migration validation passes (forward + rollback)
aggregator + replacementNet + regression + end-to-end tests pass
deduction-columns-never-written-by-fleet pinned by test

technical_requirements.title: Consumer, not producer
technical_requirements.description: Do NOT build/duplicate the Stripe rail / webhook / ops_payment_events (owned by SD-LEO-INFRA-PAYMENT-RAIL-FOUNDATION-001, completed). This SD only CONSUMES ops_payment_events and ADDS the structured substrate + transform + wiring.

technical_requirements.title: Preserve the formula contract
technical_requirements.description: replacement-net.js replacementNet() pure-function signature (revenue - business_expenses - ppo - retirement - se_tax) and fail-safe-to-0 are unchanged; add the substrate as one input source only. recurring_revenue->revenue, retirement_solo_401k->retirement mapping at the read boundary.

technical_requirements.title: Chairman-gated, never fabricated
technical_requirements.description: Deduction figures come ONLY from a chairman_decisions attestation row; absent it -> NULL/unattested/blocking, default 0 only at coalesce with an explicit surface. No self-authored attestation (no @approved-by). Migration applied to prod only via the guarded migration path after SECURITY+DATABASE review.

test_scenarios.expected: livemode=false substrate row with recurring_revenue from the charge; replacementNet returns real net; real (livemode=true) figure unaffected; test rows cleaned up
NULL ppo/retirement/se_tax + NULL ref -> coalesce 0 at boundary WITH unattested:true surfaced (no fabricated value)
after aggregation, ppo/retirement_solo_401k/se_tax remain NULL (fleet writes revenue/expenses only)

acceptance_criteria: A TEST-mode charge in ops_payment_events aggregates into a structured income_capture_monthly row (recurring_revenue from the real charge; charge id traceable); the real livemode=true figure is unaffected
The substrate stores 5 structured replacement-net inputs as columns (no net column) so net is never inferred-as-gross
replacementNet() returns correct net from the real substrate, signature unchanged; glide-path scoring regression-clean
Chairman deductions are populated only from a chairman_decisions attestation; absent it -> NULL/unattested/blocking (default 0/never fabricated, never silent)
RLS least-privilege; ops_payment_events RLS unchanged; SECURITY + DATABASE sub-agents PASS; adversarial review clean

risks.mitigation: 5 structured input columns, NO net column; TS asserts net != gross

risks.risk: Fleet-fabricated deduction figures corrupt the gauge
risks.mitigation: deductions ONLY from chairman_decisions attestation; NULL=unattested; aggregator never writes them; pinned by TS-3

risks.risk: Schema/RLS migration on financial data opens a hole
risks.mitigation: DATABASE design (done) + SECURITY review (EXEC); least-privilege RLS; no ops_payment_events change; guarded prod-apply

risks.risk: Test-mode income pollutes the real figure
risks.mitigation: UNIQUE(period_month, livemode) + gauge reads livemode=true only; test rows cleaned up
preserve pure signature; substrate is an input source only; regression test

system_architecture.summary: A new portfolio-level monthly table (income_capture_monthly) storing 5 structured replacement-net inputs (no net column), a service-role venture-agnostic aggregator transforming ops_payment_events succeeded charges into the structured monthly inputs (revenue/expenses only — never the chairman deductions), a chairman-attestation path (chairman_decisions row referenced by deduction_attestation_ref) for the deduction params, and a read-boundary wiring of replacement-net.js that consumes the substrate while preserving its pure signature and surfacing unattested deductions. Least-privilege RLS; ops_payment_events unchanged.

implementation_approach.summary: Write the income_capture_monthly migration (with rollback); build the service-role venture-agnostic aggregator (ops_payment_events succeeded -> structured monthly upsert, revenue/expenses only); wire the chairman-attestation deduction path (chairman_decisions ref; NULL=unattested); wire replacement-net.js to consume the substrate at the read boundary (preserve signature, surface unattested); prove end-to-end with a cleaned-up TEST-mode charge; SECURITY+DATABASE sub-agent review; adversarial review before merge; guarded prod migration apply.
steps: SECURITY+DATABASE review -> adversarial review -> PR -> chain -> LFA

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Apply the income_capture_monthly migration (test/guarded) and inspect the table
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: table exists with the 5 structured input columns (NO net column), UNIQUE(period_month,livemode), first-of-month CHECK, least-privilege RLS (service write, authenticated read-only), and a rollback in the migration file

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Insert a TEST-mode charge (livemode=false, succeeded) into ops_payment_events and run the aggregator in test mode
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: a livemode=false income_capture_monthly row for that month with recurring_revenue from the TEST charge (cents->dollars, traceable to the charge id); ppo/retirement_solo_401k/se_tax remain NULL (fleet never writes them)

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Call replacementNet() fed from that substrate row with NO chairman attestation, then with an attested chairman_decisions row
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: unattested -> deductions coalesce to 0 with an explicit unattested/blocking surface (no fabricated value); attested -> correct net = revenue - business_expenses - ppo - retirement - se_tax (signature unchanged)

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run the glide-path scorer regression suite and clean up the TEST rows
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: scoring/rankings unchanged (regression-clean); TEST rows removed (net-zero); the real livemode=true figure was never affected by the test row
